notes: NEW: Edit Text panel (Phase 1+2) lets you rename strings, edit bullet items, add/remove/reorder bullets, then re-render in ~30s with no Claude call. Two-row progress bar (monotonic overall + stage with indeterminate pulse). User-attached logo assets now bypass the default NVIDIA-logo ban. FIXED: renders >16s no longer crash (cap raised to 60s + auto-fix DURATION_FRAMES bug). Click-to-browse in Assets now works (label-for + FileReader staging). Drag-dropped PNG assets actually render. PNG files no longer greyed in file picker. Claude rate-limit detection (429) + backoff up to 4 min. \u2019-style Unicode escapes properly decoded. CSS junk (transformOrigin, padding) filtered from Edit Text. Smaller, refined bullet markers (3-4px radius). Bullet preservation enforced in Redesign mode.
